subject: A muscular figure crouched in a forest clearing, transforming into or merging with a wolf, surrounded by shimmering magical energy and gathering wolves
description: A bare-chested, heavily muscled figure crouches low in a dense forest, mid-transformation into a wolf form. Their body is contorted with feral energy, shoulders hunched, hands braced against the ground. Glowing magical filaments and pinkish-purple sparks of arcane light swirl around the figure, suggesting an active enchantment or divine blessing taking hold. Wolf shapes are visible in the surrounding shadows, gathering as a pack. The forest is deep green and dim, with shafts of light filtering through the canopy. The overall feel is primal, ritualistic, and transformative — the moment a hunter becomes the hunt.
foreground: crouched transforming figure with magical energy
background: dense dark green forest with wolves emerging from shadow
emotion: feral focus, predatory tension, primal surrender
